title: Create siwe-nonce Supabase Edge Function
description: Write and deploy the siwe-nonce Edge Function. It generates a random nonce, stores it in siwe_nonces with a 5-minute TTL, and returns the EIP-4361 formatted message for the wallet to sign.
acceptance_criteria: Accepts POST with body { address: string }
Validates that address is a valid Ethereum address (0x + 40 hex chars)
Generates a cryptographically random 16-byte nonce (hex string)
Inserts a row into siwe_nonces: { nonce, address, expires_at: now + 5min, used: false }
Returns { nonce, message } where message is EIP-4361 formatted
Returns 400 if address is missing or invalid

steps.details:
function buildSiweMessage(address: string, nonce: string): string {
  return [
    'flatfinder.app wants you to sign in with your Ethereum account:',
    address,
    '',
    'Sign in to FlatFinder.',
    '',
    'URI: https://flatfinder.app',
    'Version: 1',
    'Chain ID: 1',
    'Nonce: ' + nonce,
    'Issued At: ' + new Date().toISOString()
  ].join('\n');
}

technical_notes: Uses SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (not anon key) to bypass RLS and write to siwe_nonces. Never expose the service role key to the frontend.
